For the showpiece, the teams go back to the 1970s as they construct a disco-inspired showpiece, using a combination of sugar and chocolate, and incorporating desserts. Presented by Tom Allen and Liam Charles

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Police officers in Northamptonshire respond to an ever increasing number of 999 calls concerning people living in shared accommodation. The number of houses of multiple occupancy (HMO) has nearly trebled since 2013. PC Sean Whelan is dispatched to one HMO to deal with a fight in the shared kitchen. He also has to mediate between a householder who hasn't been paid the rent he's owed and a tenant with no contract in place. PC Debbie Wishart attends a hostel where she arrests a woman suspected of stealing a chicken Kiev, while PC Sam Clulow attends a call involving a vulnerable heroin user who's being preyed upon

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman with brittle bone disease who is in agony after a fall - only to find themselves with two patients on their hands as her daughter collapses in front of them. A young man whose blood sugar levels are so high is in danger of slipping into a diabetic coma, while a middle-aged man with a history of heart problems refuses to go to hospital

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A rugby player is scanned for spinal damage following a collision during a match, and describes her struggles with mental health issues as she awaits the results. A teacher is knocked off his bicycle after receiving some bad news, while a man who broke two bones in his ankle after a fall is assisted by his dead wife's best friend

programme.title: Murder in the Outback: The Falconio and Lees Mystery
programme.desc: A look at how sole eyewitness Joanne Lees came under immense scrutiny and pressure from both the British and Australian press as they hounded her continuously for an interview, while certain detectives were also sceptical of her version of events. The programme includes detailed sections of a video showing Joanne being confronted by detectives about seeming inconsistences in her account of the attack

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shawnon Bellah, the chief operating officer of Nestlé Toll House Café by Chip, goes undercover in her own company. She wants to ensure that as they grow, they aren't losing the quality and consistency that has made their brand so profitable

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig

This time, Sandi is joined by BAFTA-winning actor and writer Jessica Hynes to explore the ultimate staycations in Jessica's home county of Kent. The pair visit a lovingly restored early 1900s windmill outside the village of Benenden, before travelling to the Isle of Sheppey, where they explore Elmley National Nature Reserve, the only nature reserve in England where you can stay overnight

Iain and Judie's luxury dream trip to Vegas turned into deadly nightmare when they were caught up in the now infamous shootings in October 2017 in which 58 people were killed. programme.desc: Doctors treat Craig, a window-fitter who has fallen from a ladder and has been knocked unconscious. He has a huge gash to the back on his head, but the medical staff are concerned he may have also seriously injured his neck and spine. Meanwhile, Advanced Nurse Practitioner Dave Sagol meets 61-year-old June, who has been rushed into the hospital with swollen legs and having difficulty breathing

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Helen has an aneurysm in her brain that could burst at any time and lead to her death within minutes. For doctor Sanjeev Nayak there are no second chances as he embarks on an extraordinary operation to save his patient. Michael's life is also on a knife edge. After collapsing with a cardiac arrest, he was saved by a neighbour giving him CPR. But now the trauma doctors face a double battle - they must quickly assess his head injury and also remove a clot in his artery that is destroying his heart

programme.title: Shopping for a New Penis

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: Liverpool cathedral is the Church of England's newest cathedral, and the largest in Britain. It was designed in the Gothic style by Giles Gilbert Scott, who also designed the red telephone box. It took 74 years to build and was paid for by money donated from the people of Liverpool. National tragedies such as the sinking of the Titanic - many of whose crew came from Liverpool - and the Hillsborough football disaster are remembered within its walls. It is also where Paul McCartney composed and performed his first classical piece of music, the Liverpool Oratorio

programme.title: Thomas & Friends

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Paw Patrol - Shorts
programme.desc: It's up to Marshall to clear his name when Copy Cat steals Marshall's vehicle and impersonates him, melting everything in his path with his heat paw power

programme.title: Paw Patrol - Shorts
programme.desc: Humdinger swipes the Dino Patroller and endangers a school of baby stegosaurus', so it's up to Ryder, Rex and the Pups to come to the Dino Rescue

programme.title: Pip and Posy

programme.title: Milo

programme.title: Paw Patrol

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The pups must try to rescue Cap'n Turbot and Francois' grandma Tilly after she rides off on a dolphin

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: Fleeker's Floogalzooger is accidentally placed inside an ice lolly mould, and the Floogals discover what appear to be frozen drinks that you hold

programme.title: Wissper

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Gerald Giraffe joins Peppa's playgroup and is keen to make friends with everyone, but he finds that being so tall makes playing hide-and-seek quite a challenge

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Shiny and Iris have their hairy hearts set on becoming 'sunny stylists', but constantly get interrupted by their laughing friends - resulting in some bizarre hairstyles

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps newlyweds Martina Mullin and Padraig Whelton renovate their dark and dreary Donnycarney former council house. Having bought their home at the height of the property boom, they are now suffering negative equity, leaving them with a tight budget to make the alterations

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a couple who live with their 92-year-old uncle and enjoy having their children and grandchildren over for get-togethers extend their home in Timahoe, Portlaoise. The home is a former jailhouse with thick walls and Dermot encourages the couple's builder son to bid for the contract

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben travels to New Zealand's North Island, where he meets a young nomadic family led by Amber and Andy, who spend their life exploring the country's wild landscapes. He hears how the family's lives changed forever after one fateful day, how they swapped the stress of the city for a life on the open road, the price they paid for chasing their dream and how the horrors of the past still haunt them today

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Roo admits the early morning starts are more difficult than she imagined. Rachel and Jasmine start to bond, but once Rachel bumps into Christian, the two are drawn together again

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Levi is shaken to find a toy train on the doorstep. It is an exciting day for Paul as Leo arrives from New York

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant (2018)
programme.desc: Dr Carol Allen takes in a young local woman so she will be not living alone when her daughter starts college, unaware her new lodger is actually bent on revenge. Thriller, starring Lauralee Bell and Virginia Tucker

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: Claire and Mark await a mystery celebrity guest at their posh B&B, where they offer five-star luxury on a budget. Over at the Elgin, the all-inclusive package offer is pulling in the punters, leaving front-of-house manager Garry struggling to get rid of the current guests before the new ones arrive. And Dennis and Jane spend the weekend taking ballroom dancing lessons. Will it be enough to impress at a gala performance?

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Levi is shaken to find a toy train on the doorstep. It is an exciting day for Paul as Leo arrives from New York

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Roo admits the early morning starts are more difficult than she imagined. Rachel and Jasmine start to bond, but once Rachel bumps into Christian, the two are drawn together again

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers with Alan Davies
programme.desc: Inspector Herchy Boal receives an anonymous call about a labradoodle who is reportedly underweight, with infected ears and dirty matted fur. Meanwhile in south Yorkshire, the call centre receives an urgent report about a dog that is limp and unresponsive, and in the Wirral, Anthony Joynes is following up a horrifying case he attended the previous week

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton treats a hedgehog that has been brought into the Boroughbridge practice with a badly injured leg, and in Huddersfield, a farmer brings in a heavily pregnant ewe that is struggling to give birth. Elsewhere, Peter Wright heads back to the Teasdales' farm, where he recently delivered a healthy calf

programme.title: Lie with Me
programme.desc: Lulled into a false sense of security, Anna recommits to Jake. She continues to confide in Becky, unaware that Becky is under Jake's spell and plotting together with him against her. Later, a shocking turn of events leads Anna to discover the truth of what is going on, and she decides she is not going to be a victim any more. Starring Charlie Brooks, Brett Tucker and Phoebe Roberts

programme.title: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: Documentary about the disappearance of nine-year-old Shannon Matthews in Yorkshire in 2008, an investigation that gripped the nation, which turned out to be hoax kidnapping plot devised by her mother. Featuring exclusive interviews with Shannon's best friend, members of the local community, and the police officers who eventually found her, the programme reveals the remarkable truth of what really happened

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis presents highlights from the fourth series, including footage from a police helicopter showing a driver who ends up in a reservoir after a pursuit

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the secret of the supermarket chain's success. The programme examines the launch of a brand of organic food from Prince Charles' own duchy and reveals how the opening of a new Waitrose store has been known to boost house prices in the surrounding area. A taste test is performed to see how Waitrose's own brands compare to their rivals

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor recounts the history of Winchester Cathedral, the longest medieval cathedral in northern Europe, which has witnessed civil wars, religious battles and struggled with collapsing foundations. It is the burial place of novelist Jane Austen - though only four people attended her funeral and originally her plaque made no mention of her writing. Tony learns that Winchester's bishops were among the richest, most influential and most badly behaved in the country and some were wealthier and more powerful than even England's kings

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and the team try to find out whether paranormal forces are at work in a south London house that appears to be making the family who live there experience mood swings, anxiety and relationship breakdowns

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: A pink mansion in Edinburgh gets a makeover from Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton. They attempt to give the garishly painted home a more traditional Scottish feel by having it professionally redecorated and toning down the dark, oppressive wooden ceiling over the hallway

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Rebecca is worried that, unlike the other engines, there is nothing special about her. She is later impressed by Belle putting out a fire

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Animals overrun Barkingburg Castle while the Princess is away and it falls to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to get them under control

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: Carry On Spying (1964)
programme.desc: A secret formula is stolen by a sinister organisation masterminded by the evil Dr Crow. The British government plans to assign its top agents to deal with the crisis, but owing to staff shortages, has to settle for a bungling spy and his three hapless trainees. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Cribbins, Jim Dale, Eric Barker and Victor Maddern

programme.title: Before We Go (2014)
programme.desc: A woman is left stranded far from home after being mugged and missing her train. A penniless busker recovering from a traumatic break-up comes to her aid, and a close bond develops between the pair as they travel the city in search of her missing bag. Romantic comedy, directed by and starring Chris Evans, with Alice Eve

programme.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)
programme.desc: An ordinary man seeks solace from his mundane life by drifting into daydreams where he is a heroic figure. When he and a friend are faced with unemployment, he is propelled into a globetrotting adventure in real life. Comedy drama based on James Thurber's short story, directed by and starring Ben Stiller. With Kristen Wiig, Adam Scott and Shirley MacLaine

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Legend (2015)
programme.desc: Biopic of the Kray brothers, exploring their rise to power in the London underworld and conflicts with rival gangs from the point of view of Reggie's wife Frances, who remains devoted to her husband even as he remains equally bound to his brutal, unstable sibling. Starring Tom Hardy as both twins, with Emily Browning, Christopher Eccleston and David Thewlis

programme.title: Wild Honey Pie! (2018)
programme.desc: Gillian, an aspiring writer and her DJ husband Oliver attempt to recover when their marriage hits perhaps the first pothole before the proverbial rut. But then interest in Gillian's first play kicks off a series of encounters that could provide all the spice and complexity any marriage could want. Writer/director Jamie Adams' comedy drama, starring Jemima Kirke, Richard Elis and Sarah Solemani

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Punk Chef Scott Garthwaite travels to Yorkshire to make sure no food goes to waste. He visits a Michelin Starred restaurant, allotment owned by a Deaf foodie and a creamery

programme.title: Texas Lady (1955)
programme.desc: A woman arrives in Texas to take over the local newspaper, and vows to use it to expose corruption. Her first target is the gambler she wrongly holds responsible for her father's suicide, but who proves an unlikely ally when she faces the real villains - two cattle barons who rule the town with an iron fist. Western, with Claudette Colbert, Barry Sullivan and Gregory Walcott

programme.title: Hell Below Zero (1954)
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking explorer joins a whaling ship and is persuaded by the female captain to investigate the disappearance of her father on an earlier expedition. The pair become suspicious of her former lover - and are proved right when he leaves them for dead in Antarctic waters. Action adventure, starring Alan Ladd, Joan Tetzel, Basil Sydney and Stanley Baker

programme.title: The Blue Dahlia (1946)
programme.desc: A war-weary pilot returns home from service in Europe, but his welcome is far from warm. Not only must he deal with the news of his wife's infidelities, but he also finds himself accused of her murder. However, the wife of his dead spouse's lover is on hand to help him prove his innocence. Thriller, written by Raymond Chandler and starring Alan Ladd, Veronica Lake, William Bendix and Doris Dowling

programme.title: The Pink Panther (1963)
programme.desc: The world's most inept police detective, Inspector Clouseau, heads off to Switzerland in search of a suave jewel thief who has purloined a priceless diamond from a princess - but the bumbling officer's every ruse to foil the crime ends in chaos, not least when he is framed for the robbery himself. Blake Edwards' comedy, starring Peter Sellers, David Niven, Capucine, Robert Wagner and Claudia Cardinale

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa

programme.title: Deadpool 2 (2018)
programme.desc: The wisecracking anti-hero meets Russell, a gifted youngster pursued by a heavily armed cyborg from the future. With the aid of fellow mutant Domino and five less lucky teammates, they attempt to defeat the villainous Cable. Action comedy, starring Ryan Reynolds, Josh Brolin, Julian Dennison and Zazie Beetz

programme.title: Naked (1993)
programme.desc: An angry but highly intelligent Mancunian drifter flees his home city to avoid the family of a girl he raped. Seeking refuge with an old flame living in London, he takes to prowling the streets of the capital at night, antagonising or enthralling those he meets with his embittered personal philosophy and forcing them to question their existence. Mike Leigh's drama, starring David Thewlis and Lesley Sharp

programme.title: A Young Man with High Potential (2018)
programme.desc: Piet Carnell, a computer science student, has a brilliant mind but is sexually inexperienced. He tries his luck with the bright and beautiful Klara, but is rejected. Distraught, he takes sleeping pills and ends up experiencing one of the wildest nights of his life. Thriller, starring Adam Ild Rohweder and Paulina Galazka

programme.title: Tiger Bay (1959)
programme.desc: A Polish sailor flees Cardiff's docklands after murdering his girlfriend in a jealous rage, initially unaware that a 12-year-old tomboy has witnessed the crime and has taken his abandoned gun to show off to her friends. However, he comes back to abduct the girl in a bid to keep her quiet - but the pair form a friendship and she tries to help him escape the police. Thriller, starring Hayley Mills in her film debut alongside her father John, with Horst Buchholz

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart

programme.title: The Black Tent (1956)
programme.desc: A wounded British Army captain is saved by a tribe of nomads in the Libyan desert during the Second World War, and they take him to their camp, where he is cared for by the sheikh's daughter and falls in love with her. Romantic drama, with Anthony Steel, Anna-Maria Sandri, Donald Sinden, Andre Morell and Donald Pleasence

programme.title: The Far Country (1954)
programme.desc: A cowpoke is steering his cattle north to the Canadian border when a corrupt sheriff commandeers the herd. A local saloon-bar owner falls for the hapless cowboy, and with her help he recaptures his cattle. Hooking up with a wagon train, the couple head for the mining town of Dawson, but the thwarted and embittered sheriff is on their tail. Western, with James Stewart, Walter Brennan and Ruth Roman

programme.title: The Second Best Exotic Marigold Hotel (2015)
programme.desc: With the original Best Exotic Marigold Hotel a roaring success, owner Sonny decides the time is right to expand his business empire. But to do so, he and the rest of the residents must pull out all the stops to impress a potential investor's inspector - a task that proves to be easier said than done. Comedy drama sequel, with Dev Patel, Maggie Smith, Judi Dench and Richard Gere

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Beast (2017)
programme.desc: Moll Huntingdon works as a Jersey tour guide and lives with her parents, under the strict rules of her controlling mother Hilary. One day she's saved from a sexual assault on the deserted beach by a stranger with a gun. Writer-director Michael Pearce's thriller, starring Jessie Buckley, Johnny Flynn and Geraldine James

programme.title: The Endless (2017)
programme.desc: Brothers Justin and Aaron receive a video cassette made by Camp Arcadia, a group they belonged to as children. Justin is worried that talk of 'ascension' may be a code for some future mass suicide, but Aaron convinces him to return for one day. Sci-fi horror, directed, produced by and starring Justin Benson and Aaron Moorhead

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Diane befriends fellow new mum Becky, while Sally makes a shock decision after facing discrimination in prison, James tries to persuade DS Cohen to help with Sally's case

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring weddings, space and sci-fi fans

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie (2004)
programme.desc: The plucky sea creature sets out to prove his boss Mr Krabs is innocent of stealing Neptune's crown. However, the missing item has ended up in sinister Shell City, which all sea-dwellers fear and from which few have ever returned. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host this week is Jay Hutton from Tattoo Fixers, whose guests are actor Steven Arnold and Ewen MacIntosh and reality stars Charlotte Crosby and Dawn Ward

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former Coronation Street star Steven Arnold hosts his first ever dinner party, and unwittingly makes the same chicken and mushroom dish that Jay Hutton did the previous night

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Real Housewives of Cheshire star Dawn Ward hosts the third dinner party of the week, and she pulls out all the stops to throw the perfect dinner party for her famous guests

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actor Ewen MacIntosh of The Office fame serves up an evening of Mexican food, and leaves a lasting impression on his fellow celebrities - for all the wrong reasons

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby takes the reins for the final night of the week's competition, with the Geordie Shore star aiming for a party finale with an après-ski-theme. The soirée kicks off with fondue and Charlotte impresses her guests with personalised poems, but after a disastrous DIY dessert she needs to save her night with some banging tunes and a live saxophone player

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Babylon in New York, where the peace of Long Island is regularly shattered by the volatile Pellegrino family, proprietors of Peter's Italian Restaurant. Gordon finds owner Tina's work to save the eatery from oblivion is frequently ruined by the behaviour of her brother, a tyrannical front-of-house manager whose violent temper constantly undermines staff morale

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to reverse the fortunes of the Mixing Bowl diner in Bellmore, New York, where a talented cook's work is being undone by the manager's marketing plans - putting the finances in dire straits

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef heads to the Seascape restaurant in the village of Islip on Long Island, New York, in a bid to change the fortunes of its owner, who is nearly $1million in debt. Gordon is dismayed to discover unprotected meat and fish left next to mouldy pesto jars in the kitchen and plans to close down the eatery until radical changes are made

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is dejected to see Penny with another man and decides to cut his losses by going back to fellow scientist Leslie Winkle - a move that upsets Sheldon. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Sara Gilbert

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. First up is 24-year-old Rebecca, a singer from Nottinghamshire who is tired of always having her heart broken by guys with a bad boy image and wants to see if choosing a date in the studio can help her pick a better mate. Next up is 25-year-old development manager Dan from Durham, who has unsuccessfully tried countless dating apps and hopes to find Mr Right

programme.title: Batwoman

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Andre Jr is offered his dream job working with a hip-hop group, but Dre and Rainbow are determined to convince him it would be a better idea to return to college and get his degree

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Diane befriends fellow new mum Becky, while Sally makes a shock decision after facing discrimination in prison, James tries to persuade DS Cohen to help with Sally's case

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: New Yorker Ted Mosby begins to fear he will never find love, and decides to embark on a quest to find a woman he can share his life with. He thinks he may have discovered her when he strikes up a rapport with TV reporter Robin Scherbatsky in a bar - but his overenthusiasm proves to be a serious stumbling block. Pilot episode of the sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan, Jason Segel, Neil Patrick Harris and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted throws a party in an attempt to land a second date with Robin, but she fails to show up - so he resolves to keep arranging more get-togethers until she finally attends one. American comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: In order to achieve a better work-life balance, Mel agrees to put Joe in charge of renovating her home - but his management style leaves a lot to be desired. Meanwhile, Lennox's school drama club decides to stage a play she has written. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is charmed by the man who designs her new kitchen cabinets, but Joe fails to see eye-to-eye with him - leading to a big argument. Meanwhile, Lennox reluctantly attends one of her school's student committees, before an encounter with the organisation's presidents bolsters her enthusiasm. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's rooftop beach gets shut down by Sondra, the president of the board of the apartment building, so he plans to overthrow her and do the job himself. Meanwhile, Bonnie and Riley go on a double date with Brad and his twin brother Tad

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben arranges to meet up with a woman whose phone he has found, however when he ends up running late the father has to send Tucker in his place. Meanwhile, Riley enlists Danny to help her take revenge on an old rival, and Bonnie creates a new business slogan. Comedy series, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: In an attempt to get closer to Barry and Erica, Beverly promises to bring actor Scott Baio to town for a big charity event. Adam gets into a tricky situation when he arranges to take both his best friend Emmy and his girlfriend Dana to the school dance

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After watching a particular game show together for years, Adam and Emmy are excited to learn that the producers will be holding auditions at their school. Beverly turns to Bill for help when Barry and Murray become convinced that she is a lucky charm for their beleaguered football team

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to Las Vegas and does everything he can to win a large sum of money for science. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette take Amy shopping for a wedding dress, but her terrible choice entangles them in a web of lies

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns that his mother won't attend his wedding unless he invites his brother Georgie, he and Leonard travel to Texas to end a family feud. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette's children inadvertently give them, Amy and Raj conjunctivitis. Jerry O'Connell guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is delighted that Leonard has finally managed to find a girlfriend who meets his high standards, but his over-exuberance looks set to cause problems. Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica forget to buy Beverly a Mother's Day gift and make last-minute 'Mom Coupons' instead. Understandably hurt, Beverly gets her revenge by cashing in every coupon they have made in one go. Adam yearns to go to a summer camp for junior astronauts and accuses his father of crushing his dreams when he isn't keen to give permission

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's favourite shirt is hated by both his mother Beverly and his girlfriend Lainey, so they hatch a plan together to destroy it. However, once the shirt goes missing, Barry asks Adam and Erica to investigate. Murray decides to tear down the family tree house, leaving Adam distraught

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre discovers that Lynette is an art aficionado like himself and the two quickly bond and become close, while Junior introduces Bow to virtual reality

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are worried about Junior's future working odd jobs, especially after he tells them he wants to produce shows for unknown comiedians

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy are devastated after learning from a Russian paper that Super Asymmetry has already been discovered and disproved. Bernadette wants to beat Howard in a video game

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Harley Quinn

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they watch in December 2016, including Strictly Come Dancing, Planet Earth II, First Dates, Rillington Place, David Blaine: Beyond Magic, The Big Life Fix with Simon Reeve, When Phillip Met Prince Philip and White Christmas

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Animated US sitcom set in the world of Rick, a genius inventor and his less-than-genius grandson Morty. In the first episode, missing for nearly 20 years, drunken scientist Rick arrives on his daughter Beth's doorstep looking to move in, but her husband Jerry isn't too thrilled. Rick converts the garage into his laboratory and involves easily influenced grandson Morty in his insane misadventures, starting with a mission to another dimension to find the seeds to mega-trees

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick helps Jerry out with the family dog Snuffles by creating a device to make him more intelligent, but things go awry. Rick and Morty also invade the dreams of Morty's maths teacher Mr Goldenfold in an effort to raise Morty's grades. Rob Paulsen and Jess Harnell guest star

programme.title: Rick and Morty

programme.desc: New Yorker Ted Mosby begins to fear he will never find love, and decides to embark on a quest to find a woman he can share his life with. He thinks he may have discovered her when he strikes up a rapport with TV reporter Robin Scherbatsky in a bar - but his overenthusiasm proves to be a serious stumbling block. Pilot episode of the sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan, Jason Segel, Neil Patrick Harris and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted throws a party in an attempt to land a second date with Robin, but she fails to show up - so he resolves to keep arranging more get-togethers until she finally attends one. American comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Cobie Smulders

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: In order to achieve a better work-life balance, Mel agrees to put Joe in charge of renovating her home - but his management style leaves a lot to be desired. Meanwhile, Lennox's school drama club decides to stage a play she has written. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is charmed by the man who designs her new kitchen cabinets, but Joe fails to see eye-to-eye with him - leading to a big argument. Meanwhile, Lennox reluctantly attends one of her school's student committees, before an encounter with the organisation's presidents bolsters her enthusiasm. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chef's attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney decides he needs a little more excitement in his life, so Ted agrees to join him on a trip to Philadelphia. However, their big night out culminates in a brush with the law. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted finds a shirt he has not worn in years, which brings back memories and gives him a new perspective in his search for love. Barney bribes Robin to say something shocking during a news bulletin - but the prank backfires. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe are shocked to discover that Lennox's boyfriend Aidan spent the night in her bedroom, but Joe is even more taken aback at Mel's easy-going reaction to the situation. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Holly declares that it is time for him to start shaving

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Joe starts to run Mel's finances, he becomes convinced that her credit card statement reveals that she is having an affair with a married man. Meanwhile, Lennox tries to get along with her friend's new date - until he reveals that he has a crush on her and Ryder tries to decide what to get Holly for her birthday

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley makes a bet with Ben that he cannot get a second date with Heather, but when she fails to jump at the chance to go out with him again, Ben resorts to desperate measures to win the wager. Bonnie meets a handsome stranger and considers ending her relationship with Brad. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Chelsea Kane

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker acts like a lawyer in front of his father because he has forgotten to tell him he has dropped out of law school and works in TV. Meanwhile, Riley has a crush on a British guy, but Bonnie mistakenly thinks she has fallen for Danny. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry takes inspiration from Lionel Richie and sets about creating a sculpture of Lainey as the ultimate Valentine's Day gift. Murray advises Adam to defy his mother and sneak into a screening of the restricted-rated film Porky's, and Geoff agrees to be just good friends with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's plan to reignite his fading relationship with Dana by taking her to a 'Weird Al' Yankovic concert backfires. When Barry and Erica become peer counsellors at school, they worry that Murray may be feeling depressed. 'Weird Al' Yankovic and Tim Meadows guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's honeymoon runs aground in New York, Penny and Leonard discover that they are uncomfortably similar to Amy's parents, while Raj insults astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and starts a war on social media. Kathy Bates and Teller (of Penn and Teller fame) guest star as Amy's parents

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy drive themselves to distraction trying to figure out what the 'perfect gift' is that Leonard and Penny have got them for their wedding. Meanwhile, Raj decides he wants to settle down and asks his father to arrange a marriage for him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries about being 'hazed' by the older students when he goes to high school, but he soon earns their respect by body-slamming Barry. Erica and her friends talk about what they are going to put into their school-time capsule

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school. Beverly gets her teaching certificate and aims to work as a substitute teacher at her children's school, but things go awry and the kids end up in a Saturday detention. But after Murray pays a visit to the school, everyone learns an important lesson. Tim Meadows and Allie Grant guest star

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre is thrown off when Pops shows up to the house full of festive cheer. The whole family gets into the holiday spirit, until someone from Lynette's past shows up

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Bow takes Diane to a salon and wants to spend this time together as a bonding opportunity. Diane is conflicted about her hair

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: As the wedding of Gina's mother and Boyle's father arrives, each member of the squad is given a task to complete for the big day. However, Peralta and Santiago get sidetracked chasing a criminal, and Jeffords struggles to officiate at the ceremony. Comedy, guest starring Sandra Bernhard and Nick Cannon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes jealous when Amy gets attention in the media, Raj spots Anu talking to her ex-boyfriend, and Stuart is intimidated by the idea of moving in with Denise, all of which cause mayhem when Penny and Leonard organise a paintball game

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's former boyfriend Zack and his wife encounter fertility problems when wanting a baby, so ask Leonard for his help. Raj attempts to patch things up with his estranged fiancee Anu

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Jorgie Porter continues her look back at the soap's classic weddings. Mercedes has fallen head over heels for Dr Browning, unaware that he killed her nurse friend Lynsey

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: After surviving their first charter, the crew heads out when one crew member's shocking revelation leaves a lasting impression

programme.title: Atomic Blonde (2017)
programme.desc: MI6 operative Lorraine Broughton is sent to Berlin before the fall of the wall to investigate the murder of a fellow spy and recover a missing list of double agents. The city is in a dangerously unstable state, and she finds herself targetted by multiple factions plotting to exploit the uncertain future for their own ruthless ends. Thriller, starring Charlize Theron, James McAvoy and John Goodman

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson guides two more singletons on the dating show based naked attraction alone. First into the studio is 26-year-old Adele from Scotland. After beating cancer, Adele wants to live life to the full and find a guy who feels the same. She is followed by 22-year-old Jack from Manchester. After a dramatic four-stone weight-loss, Jack wants to show off his new body and attract the one for him

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The amateur critics share their opinions on TV from February 2017, including The Jump, Dragons' Den, Death in Paradise, Jon Richardson: How to Survive the End of the World, SS-GB and the news. Craig Cash narrates

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reformed teen rebel and unlikely baker Sunny, 33, is partnered with Misha, but is a cupcake enough to spark a romance between these two self-professed boffins? In a first for the show, 22-year-old twins nervously embark on a double date, with die-hard Cher fan Stephen meeting legal assistant Emily, while his sister Rebecca sits down with engineer Kristian. Plus, there is a special guest at the First Dates restaurant as maitre d' Fred's father visits from France. And naturally, he has a way with the ladies

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Jerry gets everyone to ditch their mobile phones and tablets so that the family can really bond when his parents pay a holiday visit and bring along a new friend. Meanwhile, Rick builds a tiny amusement park inside the body of his homeless friend Ruben, but when problems arise he must shrink Morty down and inject him into the site in an attempt to save Ruben's life. Special Christmas episode guest starring Dana Carvey and John Oliver

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo try to get to the bottom of a twisted mystery when aliens transport them into a familiar but alternate reality created in a huge simulation chamber on board their spaceship. An oblivious Jerry is accidentally included in the experiment but fails to notice the subtle changes in his surroundings as he makes a big advertising pitch at work. An episode inspired by the twist-filled films of M Night Shyamalan, guest starring David Cross (Arrested Development)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The amateur critics share their opinions on TV from February 2017, including The Jump, Dragons' Den, Death in Paradise, Jon Richardson: How to Survive the End of the World, SS-GB and the news. Craig Cash narrates

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney decides he needs a little more excitement in his life, so Ted agrees to join him on a trip to Philadelphia. However, their big night out culminates in a brush with the law. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted finds a shirt he has not worn in years, which brings back memories and gives him a new perspective in his search for love. Barney bribes Robin to say something shocking during a news bulletin - but the prank backfires. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

Meanwhile, Lennox tries to get along with her friend's new date - until he reveals that he has a crush on her and Ryder tries to decide what to get Holly for her birthday

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Italy to discover how manufacturers can claim to pack so many flavours into their coffee pods when they use just two types of beans, while Matt Tebbutt finds out about baby carrots in the Netherlands. Kate Quilton asks why some vanilla ice-creams are more expensive than others, and Helen Lawal is in Tanazania to see the incredible lengths that vanilla farmers must go to

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a father and son planning to convert an oil rig escape boat into a floating home, and an inventor working on a perfectly spherical house. The Spanish tour concludes with a visit to a studio apartment by the sea with rotating internal walls, and the team's expandable camper goes on its maiden voyage at the grand opening on Hastings Pier

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: In the second episode, George Clarke is joined by leading architects to help transform a house belonging to Nick and Sonia, an appallingly designed flat spread over three dysfunctional car parking spaces. George charges award-winning architects Abigail Ashton and Andrew Porter with creating something beautiful from this monstrosity. But working with a budget of £75,000, can they transform this foul flat into a proper home with two floors? And what will the pair's neighbours make of the drastic changes?

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke returns to unlock the potential of old houses. He meets teachers Simon and Sofie, whose 1930s Liverpool semi has lost its way thanks to a small kitchen squeezed into what would have been the wash house and some dodgy interior design choices made by the previous owner. Can he come up with a structural redesign and interior scheme with just £15,000? He also visits a medieval farmhouse in Kent that's like a perfectly preserved time capsule and needs an upgrade suitable for a young and rapidly growing family

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at stately home Anstey Hall in Cambridge, with father and son team John and Johnny de Bruyne. The fun starts with a character-revealing afternoon of goose-herding, before the participants dress to impress at a formal dinner. John recounts stories of royal connections - which fails to impress hotel managers Mark and Layla. In the morning, as they tuck in to a self-service breakfast, guest Tim decides that DIY doesn't work at Anstey Hall, but when he notes this on his feedback form, John and Johnny accuse him of game-playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to clothes-free Clover Spa and Hotel in Birmingham, where owner Tim Higgs hopes to convert his rivals to the joys of naturism. Judging with an extra critical eye are John and Jonny De Bruyne, who received negative feedback from Tim, and a thorough room inspection reveals a dusty porn DVD. Tim tries to encourage his nervous guests to take part in a naked spa experience, but John opts to watch television instead. When feedback is invited, Tim is delighted to discover Mark and Layla would stay again but shocked by the 'porn film' discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Angel Hotel in Coleford, Gloucestershire for the third day of the competition, where a treasure hunt organised by hosts Mark and Layla brings out their guests' competitive sides. Meanwhile, there is confusion at breakfast and Layla's manners are criticised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Higher Gitcombe in Totnes, Devon, where owners Paul and Lynnie Jolly set out to spoil their guests. Everyone is overwhelmed by the added extras, but naturist Tim is put off by cushions and clutter. After a masterclass in Nordic walking, Lynnie serves up a veg smoothie, which unhealthy eaters Mark and Layla dubiously down in one. Over dinner, Tim challenges his host's organic 'niche'. And Layla, still smarting from his negative feedback, labels him 'weird, naked Tim'. At breakfast, guests are wary as Tim's order goes wrong and Jonny and Layla engage in an eating competition. When feedback is invited, the Jollys are affronted by accusations of special treatment and vow to put the record straight

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition, the owners of Anstey Hall, the Clover Spa and Hotel, the Angel Hotel and Higher Gitcombe meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Having aired their issues, the winners are announced

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor. Couple Emma and Paul have bought a chateau in northern France. Carpenter Paul crafts a safety fence for their elevated swimming pool, Emma tackles their maze, and their first paying guests arrive. Cameras also capture Clive and his family, including 20-year-old daughter Abbie, who manages their 36-bedroom chateau in the Dordogne Valley. Getting their chateau ready for the wedding season, the family tackle the leaky roof and refresh the bedrooms, but the furniture proves tricky to fit.And three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau, but they have a very long checklist

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick helps Paul cut some Vitrolite vintage tiles for an art deco bathroom - but it proves harder than they expected. Some lime plastering back at Paul's chateau requires a search for some horse hair from a local stables. Abbie is busy painting furniture for bedrooms, and mum Karen has problems with their swimming pool, the fire extinguishers certifications all need renewing, and with a big wedding party arriving soon, the to-do list just keeps getting longer

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Four sets of campsite proprietors battle it out to be named best value, with the competition beginning at Amber's Bell Tent Camping in Mannington, Norfolk, a retro-styled pre-erected campsite where artistic host Amber Wykes challenges her guests to go native with a series of bushcraft trials. Over dinner, guests Derek and Julie's opinions on glamping irritate both Amber, and glampsite owners Nick and Sheila. Then back at the tents, brother-and-sister team Russell and Jane aren't too impressed with the sleeping arrangements. In the morning, the self-catering breakfast leads to complaints aimed squarely at Amber

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second day of the competition is at Park Farm Camping and Caravan Site in Norfolk, where husband and wife team Derek and Julie Nice are proud to show off their budget, family-friendly site. Former marksman Derek treats his guests to a spot of clay pigeon shooting, bringing out his competitive side

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to 500-year-old Layer Marney Tower in Essex for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed into luxury glamping lodges by Nick and Sheila Charrington. The guests have little to complain about with the accommodation, but a revelation over dinner changes how they see things. Plus, a treasure hunt organised by the hosts sends one team on a wild goose chase

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Day four is at the Foxhunter Park in Kent, where brother and sister Jane Stacey and Russell Saunders own a caravan site that includes a bistro and entertainment. The accommodation is luxurious but the large scale of the site does not sit well with the campers - and the evening entertainment of a fire-eating limbo dancer leaves most of them cold

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The campers meet for the final time to find out what they thought one another's stay was worth. Amber is offended by Derek's low scoring, while he is thrown by Nick and Sheila's feedback. Russell and Jane have an axe to grind with Derek whose low scoring of their park is made worse by what they see as a personal attack on their hosting, while Nick and Sheila appear to emerge relatively unscathed

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics fight to save a man whose heart has stopped for more than 50 minutes, and a young boy is found unconscious in a Coventry park after drinking two litres of whisky. Plus in Birmingham, a 93-year-old grandmother is stranded on the floor

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire. This edition focuses on the high numbers of crimes of a sexual nature involving women being targeted by predatory males as the county's force receives three times as many reports of voyeurism and men exposing themselves than any other in the UK

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The hospital documentary returns, focusing on the stories of two motorcyclists, which reveal how the bonds between loved ones can be strengthened through adversity. Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Co Durham, Anthony needs specialist attention after he comes off his motorbike. Helicopter medics are diverted from a training mission to help Deyon, who is trapped in his car after a crash on a country road. Meanwhile in Norfolk, there's an urgent call to a cardiac arrest

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics fight to save a man whose heart has stopped for more than 50 minutes, and a young boy is found unconscious in a Coventry park after drinking two litres of whisky. Plus in Birmingham, a 93-year-old grandmother is stranded on the floor

Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priests organise a raffle to raise funds to repair their leaky roof, planning to award a car as the prize. Unfortunately, Ted accidentally wrecks it before the grand draw takes place, and embarks on a frantic search for a replacement. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon play the Craggy Island clerics

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Devon County Show, where she discovers the secret of home-made handscrub and learns about beekeeping and making beeswax candles. She also tries her hand at crafting jewellery in silver clay - an ideal way of making unusual but inexpensive gifts

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers look for the heirs of a newly advertised estate, and learn that a family member once made lace for Queen Victoria. Plus, two sisters embark on a journey of discovery when it is revealed they are descendants of someone they never knew existed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Northamptonshire in search of more upcycling prospects. Simon finds some night vision goggles and an antique snooker table that's seen better days, while Henry chooses an enormous US army truck as one of his picks

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting a Norman castle, restoring a Fiat 500 and making a table from part of Southend pier

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to Cambridge to rescue a cherished 1991 Range Rover Vogue SE, which is in need of some TLC

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crew members take drastic steps to reset a patient's dangerously fast heartbeat, a cyclist crashes in a remote area, and a motorist is injured in a road accident

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Swallows Rest in Weymouth, Dorset, where hosts Jane and Keith Smith are pulling out all the stops to win. However, the colour combinations in the rooms do not go down well with rival B&B owner Ray Chowdhury, and an afternoon of drawing starts some competition between Ray and newlyweds James and Darren Kosa-Jones

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Burley Inn in the New Forest, where newlyweds Darren and James welcome their guests. Donna and David prove to have a critical eye when they discover holes in the sheets, and Jane and Keith have a disagreement over a toilet roll. In the afternoon, the couple reveal their quizmaster skills, before Ray grills them on how they run their B&B over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Hotel Montville in Redditch, Worcestershire for the third day of the competition, where first impressions of Ray Chowdhury's unique style and decor are positive. However, room inspections leave Jane and Keith Smith threatening not to stay, and the guests grill their host about his business background at dinner. Although some light relief is given in the form of ice sculpting, breakfast disappoints James and Darren Kosa-Jones, and Ray must face the harsh reality of his guests' opinions at feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to Donna and David's Silverton B&B in Shrewsbury, where the complimentary earplugs soon have Darren and James worrying about the noise from the road outside. A Segway race helps whip up the guests' competitive spirit, Donna gets emotional when her work-life balance is questioned, and chef David proves he can handle the unexpected at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner announced. Swallows Rest is first up and hosts Jane and Keith want to find out about Ray's colour preferences. Next Darren and James of the Burley Inn quiz Ray over his fussiness around their pine furniture. When it comes to the Silverton, B&B team Donna and David take umbrage with Jane and Keith's comments

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: An off-the-grid monolith in the Marlborough Sounds is a challenging build. But when you live 12,000 miles away like the O'Briens, it's nigh on impossible

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pets with problems include a rare breed of bulldog called Cyrus, who has multiple issues, a lame husky named Ghost, and a Maltese-bichon frise cross suffering from seizures. Plus, Bucklersbury Bear, a huge Newfoundland, finds a new lease of life post-surgery - in the water

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The temperatures soar as Dick and Angel face the busiest period of the year, as the school holidays coincide with peak wedding season. Dick comes up with an ingenious solution to stop wedding cakes from melting in the heat, but it involves piercing the chateau's walls. The moat is transformed into a boating lake, giving visitors a chance to cool down, and the family takes to the water in a home-made punt

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Ben and Rachel Hammond have spent a year searching London for somewhere exciting to live with their two daughters, and they have finally stumbled on a 1950s home on a unique plot, situated within the leafy depths of a park in the south of the city. The only problem is the house itself - an ugly, inefficient and uninspiring property - and their solution is to radically transform it into a sleek, modernist masterpiece. But this is no easy task, as Kevin McCloud finds out

programme.title: Full Bloom
programme.desc: America's budding florists compete in a design contest. In the first round, the contestants must create botanical waterfalls and recreations of Van Gogh paintings

programme.title: Billionaire Cruise Ship: Paradise Island
programme.desc: A look at the day-to-day life on the private island of Ocean Cay - an exclusive, luxurious tropical paradise in the Bahamas. The island is owned by the giant cruise liner company, MSC Cruises, and three times a week a ship carrying over 5,000 expectant holidaymakers arrives, who demand the very best service and facilities

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 14-year-old is rushed to St George's after falling head first over the handlebars of her bike and hitting her head, and doctors are concerned she may have caused serious damage. Meanwhile, Geoffrey, who is 56, has been urgently transferred from another hospital after a severe infection left him with a compromised airway and struggling to breathe

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as Sean Lock and Michelle Wolf take on Jon Richardson and Rob Beckett. Susie Dent is joined by Spencer Jones in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers

programme.title: Full Bloom
programme.desc: America's budding florists compete in a design contest. In the first round, the contestants must create botanical waterfalls and recreations of Van Gogh paintings

programme.title: Billionaire Cruise Ship: Paradise Island
programme.desc: A look at the day-to-day life on the private island of Ocean Cay - an exclusive, luxurious tropical paradise in the Bahamas. The island is owned by the giant cruise liner company, MSC Cruises, and three times a week a ship carrying over 5,000 expectant holidaymakers arrives, who demand the very best service and facilities

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty tries to find out what the white powdery residue that can form on chocolate is with the aid of the world's biggest X-ray machine, which is 2.3km in circumference. In Belgium, Kate Quilton asks if any of the ingredients in bedtime teas can really help people to sleep, while Matt Tebbutt is in the Netherlands to discover if balls of Edam really were once used as emergency cannonballs

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: In this bite-sized episode, Kirstie Allsopp plans to surprise her guests with two main courses - roast beef with mulled wine gravy, and masala cauliflower with coconut stuffing for the vegetarians

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate officers work on the case of a £1.3million estate belonging to a retired policeman and share the story of an investigation that took them to Ireland. Plus, the team reveals more details of unclaimed assets

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores two quad bikes and a stylish sun lounger, while Simon O'Brien rescues a holed canoe and turns an old oak beam into a spice rack

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Essex, where Henry restores a car trailer and a 1970s racing bike, and Simon turns his attention to lovingly restoring a vintage model aircraft

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a BMW 2002 Turbo for a man who has owned it for 30 years, but has been unable to maintain it due to ill health

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams are called out to help a man who is having a heart attack, and there is a dramatic night-time car crash in Norfolk

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the King's Head in Addlethorpe, Lincolnshire, where landlady Helen Coy and her bar manager and best friend Emma Green are pulling out all the stops to win. The B&B owners are taken back to their childhood at the funfair, At dinner, B&B beginners Louise and Andy Macbeth rattle nerves when Louise reveals her past career as a hospitality journalist - leaving pub veteran Helen less than impressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: B&B newcomers Andy and Louise Macbeth invite their rival hoteliers to spend the night at the dog-friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, where an extra-critical Helen and Emma discover what they believe to be stray dog hairs in their bed. A fishing trip makes Terri feel a little out of sorts, and when the time arrives for feedback, the managers are surprised to learn two of their guests have indicated they would not come back for a second stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Albaston in Torquay for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed by owners and avid souvenir collectors, Kevin and Julie Shadbolt. Terri and Stuart are impressed by their room, but are startled by the memorabilia in the communal lounge, and expectations are raised at dinner when Kevin reveals he has a secret recipe for success when it comes to breakfast. However, at feedback the next day, tensions begin to rise

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay of the week is in Bournemouth, at Terri and Stewart's specialist dance holiday venue the Hotel Piccadilly, where a class in the grand ballroom soon has the guests in a spin. However, temperatures rise over dinner when the simmering tension between Louise and Helen finally boils over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet up for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. King's Head landlady Helen challenges Louise and Andy about the problems they reported on cleanliness in the bathroom. while Louise and Andy from Beck Hall get hot under the collar when the others criticise their dog-friendly approach

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Sumita and Cameron Dale want to build a lighthouse with virtually no money. Chris Moller reveals whether the couple can pull it off

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Russian blue cat is brought into the surgery with a shattered jaw after a dog attack, and a man living in a homeless shelter brings in his best friend Spud, a Labrador cross with a lame back leg. Plus, Noel tries to help straighten a deformity in a six-month-old Chihuahua puppy's leg

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The wedding season draws to close, but Dick and Angel need to look ahead to the winter. Dick ploughs up the wild flower meadow, a change that Angel does not entirely approve of, and the couple transform the dilapidated coach house into a cafe, complete with a striking neon sign

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a master craftsman whose dream is to build a castle in rural Devon made entirely of mud. Kevin McCabe plans to form the huge property out of two vast curved roundhouses - the largest of which is inspired by the natural geometry of a snail shell - connected by glazing and topped with wildflower meadow roofs to mirror the surrounding countryside. However, the project involves mixing and laying a mind-boggling 2,000 tons of cob, all during warm, sunny weather - and the sheer scale of the task soon becomes clear

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: The return of the series following people who aspire to live in stunning homes that float on water. Classical pianists Masayuki Tayama and Rhiana Henderson have a dream of combining their two passions, music and canal cruising. So they are risking Masayuki's life savings to commission a one-of-a-kind floating home that is also a concert hall - and a hotel

programme.title: The Windsors: Inside the Royal Dynasty
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the history of the British royal family in the 20th century. This episode focuses on the great pressure Prince Charles came under to marry and produce an heir for the Windsor dynasty

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Miles Jupp take on Jon Richardson and Rose Matafeo, while Vic Reeves joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The department treats a 31-year-old biker who was involved in a head-on collision, and a teenager left with injuries to his hand after punching through a window. Plus, Resus team members struggle to revive two elderly patients, and discuss what they would want done for them in a similar situation

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

Matt Tebbutt is in Germany to investigate a new type of yoghurt that claims to be full of fibre, but doesn't have any bits in it
